rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using valid syntax: assume/guarantee labels, eq/const declarations, and assign statements
Place assumptions and guarantees in the correct scope: component type for ports, implementation for subcomponent bindings
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) and implication for contract patterns
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees only when concrete bounds, constants, or visible relations are available
generic_rules: Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope; do not invent declarations
AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool; avoid using AADL property names as AGREE variables
Delete or rewrite AGREE clauses that reference unresolved identifiers
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) and implication for contract patterns
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
Place assumptions and guarantees in the correct scope: component type for ports, implementation for subcomponent bindings
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
Do not invent declarations for unresolved identifiers; use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables; AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool
